title: MedMentor Case File
description: Schema for authored medical simulation case files stored under the cases directory.

id.description: Stable unique case identifier used by the backend and frontend.

version.description: Positive integer revision number for the case definition.

category.description: Human-readable category label used for filtering and display.

difficulty.description: Simple difficulty label such as easy, medium, or hard.

tags.description: Short topical tags used for future filtering, search, or authoring support.

patientSex.description: Simple patient sex label used in UI and prompts.

patientBrief.description: Short frontend-safe patient summary shown on the case card.

openingComplaint.description: Seed complaint that guides the opening patient message.

authorNote.description: Hidden authoring guidance for the model; keep this case-specific.

facts.description: Structured interview facts grouped into simple buckets.

symptoms.description: Positive symptoms the patient can reveal when questioned.

history.description: Relevant history or context facts the patient can reveal when questioned.

negatives.description: Explicit negative findings or absent symptoms.

diagnosisOptions.description: Plausible final diagnosis choices presented to the user.

correctDiagnosis.description: Exact correct diagnosis string. It should match one item from diagnosisOptions.
